name: Jeremy Steig
abstract: Jeremy Steig (September 23, 1942 – April 13, 2016) was an American jazz flutist.

about_quotes.speaker: Denny Zeitlin
about_quotes.evidence: I was a featured pianist with Jeremy Steig. It was an album called “Flute Fever.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Denny Zeitlin interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: I recorded with them in ’64. But what changed my life entirely was I playing with Jeremy Steig a lot... Jeremy got a call from Tim Hardin... And he got me on keyboards... the original fusion band... with Jeremy Steig and Randy Brecker and myself and Joe Beck.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Wall and Adam Nussbaum
about_quotes.evidence: The mention of Jeremy Steig is made by the [INTERVIEWER], not the [INTERVIEWEE]. The [INTERVIEWEE] does not respond with any personal connection or confirmation of working with Jeremy Steig.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Wall and Adam Nussbaum interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Sudhalter
about_quotes.evidence: I listened to sort of Harold McNair, Jeremy Steig, Frank Wess, just everybody I could get my hands on.
